text:
やったぁ！
これでお肌のお手入れは万全ね！

え？　個人的な依頼じゃないかって？
違うわよ、ぜーんぜん違うから！

エキスを独り占めして化粧水代わりに
使おうなんて、絶対に思ってないから！
さあて、薬膳料理を考えなきゃ

Wonderful! This right here is the key to having
perfect skin!

What? No! Of course I didn't ask you to go out
and get this just for me. Don't be silly!

The thought of using all the extract
from this for some moisturizer never
even crossed my mind!

Now then, how am I going to cook
this up into a real healthy treat...?
